name: Agent-Based Modeling of Low-Emission Fertilizer Adoption for Dairy Farm Decarbonisation using Empirical Farm Data
summary: arXiv:2605.03648v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: To understand complex system dynamics in dairy farming requires tools that capture farm heterogeneity, social interactions, and cumulative enviro...
description: arXiv:2605.03648v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: To understand complex system dynamics in dairy farming requires tools that capture farm heterogeneity, social interactions, and cumulative environmental impacts. This study proposes an agent-based modelling(ABM) framework to simulate nitrogen management and low-emission fertiliser adoption across 295 Irish dairy farms over a 15-year period. Us...
author: Surya Jayakumar, Kieran Sullivan, John McLaughlin, Christine OMeara, Indrakshi Dey
